# Limestone block — 15/s output

Single-recipe extraction block. 114 consumers — Tier A boundary item.

## Recipe table

| Recipe | Factory | Count |
|---|---|---|
| extract-limestone-01 | soil-extractor-mk01 | 38 |

15 MW electric

## Stations (2)

| Station | Direction | Item | Rate/s |
|---|---|---|---|
| water | unload | water (fluid) | 750 |
| limestone | load | limestone (item) | 15 |

## Notes

- 750/s water exceeds mk01 fluid wagon (400/s). Use mk02+ wagon or build near water.
- 38 extractors at 7×7 = 1,862 tiles. Fits one city block comfortably.
- 15/s = 1 yellow belt. Stamp for more throughput.
- Current demand: 4.72/s (2× acetylene stamps). Substantial headroom for future consumers (glass, lime, metallurgy, agriculture).
